raw_response: {"file_type":"OpenAPI 3.1.0 specification (JSON)","line_count":1,"api_title":"Task Manager API","api_version":"2.4.1","servers":["https://api.taskmanager.io/v2 (Production)","https://staging.taskmanager.io/v2 (Staging)","http://localhost:8080/v2 (Local development)"],"security_schemes":["bearerAuth (JWT)","apiKey (X-API-Key header)"],"tags":["Tasks","Assignments","Comments","Attachments","Search & Batch"],"endpoints":[{"path":"/tasks","methods":["GET","POST"],"operations":["listTasks","createTask"]},{"path":"/tasks/{task_id}","methods":["GET","PATCH","DELETE"],"operations":["getTask","updateTask","deleteTask"]},{"path":"/tasks/{task_id}/assign","methods":["PATCH"],"operations":["assignTask"]},{"path":"/tasks/{task_id}/comments","methods":["GET","POST"],"operations":["listComments","createComment"]},{"path":"/tasks/{task_id}/attachments","methods":["GET","POST"],"operations":["listAttachments","uploadAttachment"]},{"path":"/tasks/search","methods":["POST"],"operations":["searchTasks"]},{"path":"/tasks/batch","methods":["POST"],"operations":["batchTasks"]}],"schemas":["TaskStatus","Priority","User","Task","TaskCreateRequest","TaskUpdateRequest","Comment","Attachment","Pagination","ErrorResponse","TaskListResponse","CommentListResponse"],"reusable_responses":["BadRequest","Unauthorized","NotFound","InternalError"],"functions":[],"classes":[],"imports":[],"complexity_notes":"Comprehensive OpenAPI 3.1 spec defining 7 paths with 12 operations covering full task lifecycle. Uses reusable components (12 schemas, 4 error responses, 2 security schemes) via $ref for DRY. Features include: pagination (page/per_page pattern), filtering by status/priority/assignee/date, full-text search with field selection, batch operations (up to 50 ops), multipart file uploads (25MB cap), threaded comments with parent_id, and dual authentication (JWT + API key). Rich validation via patterns (task_/att_/req_ ID formats), min/max lengths, enums, and format constraints (uuid, date-time, uri, email, binary). Includes multiple realistic request/response examples per operation. Well-structured, production-grade specification."}
